---
title: Monstres de Léopold Chauveau
author: Raphaële Slimane
image: https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784557540/chauveau_20230118_cfbcqn.png
description: Exposition au musée d'Orsay sur les monstres de Chauveau
categories: ["miscellaneous"]
date: 2023-01-18
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784557540/chauveau_20230118_cfbcqn.png)


::: {.visually-hidden}
{{< meta description >}}
:::
